name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100–$500), installment loans (up to $1,000), and title loans (up to $25,000) with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender specializing in short-term emergency financing solutions. The company operates physical store locations across multiple states, including the Jacksonville, FL branch at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave., and provides both in-store and online lending services.

The company offers three primary loan products: Payday Loans ($100–$500, 2–4 week terms), Installment Loans ($100–$1,000 with multiple repayment periods), and Title Loans ($2,000–$25,000 where a vehicle serves as collateral). All products are designed for quick access to cash, with same-day funding available. The Jacksonville location is open Monday–Thursday 10 am–6 pm, Friday 9 am–6 pm, and Saturday 9 am–4 pm, and offers bilingual service (Spanish-language support noted on website).

Advance America emphasizes customer service and convenience, highlighting trained staff to guide borrowers through product selection. The company reports a 4.9 out of 5 star rating based on 125,598 reviews. The Jacksonville store location provides Western Union services in addition to lending products. Online application and pre-qualification options are available via phone at (904) 781-7075.

As an emergency cash lender, Advance America targets consumers facing immediate financial needs between paychecks. Borrowers should be aware that payday and installment loans are short-term solutions with associated fees and interest rates typical of this lending category. Title loans require vehicle ownership and a clear title, limiting eligibility. The company does not advertise APR rates or detailed fee structures on the location page, which is standard for the category but represents a transparency gap for cost-conscious consumers.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans up to $1,000
Offers three distinct loan products (payday, installment, title) to accommodate different borrowing needs
High customer satisfaction with 4.9/5 rating based on 125,598 reviews
Bilingual service (Spanish-language support) at physical locations
Title loans available up to $25,000 for vehicle owners with clear titles
Extended hours (10 am–6 pm weekdays, 9 am–4 pm Saturday) for working customers
Multiple application channels: in-store, online, and phone pre-qualification
Additional services like Western Union money transfers at store locations
cons: Payday loans capped at $500 with very short 2–4 week repayment terms, creating rapid repayment pressure
APR rates and full fee schedules not disclosed on location page, limiting transparency for cost comparison
Title loans require vehicle ownership with clear title and full payoff, excluding many borrowers
Short-term loan structure designed for emergency use only; not suitable for long-term debt needs
No advertised alternative products for borrowers seeking longer repayment terms or lower-cost financing
best_for: Employed individuals needing $100–$1,000 urgently between paychecks
Vehicle owners seeking larger loans ($2,000–$25,000) using car title as collateral
Spanish-speaking borrowers in Jacksonville area seeking bilingual financial services
Consumers requiring same-day cash access with flexible in-store or online application options
diagnosis: Advance America is best for employed consumers in immediate need of $100–$1,000 in emergency cash who can qualify based on income verification and checking account access. The primary caveat is that all loan products are short-term solutions with fees and interest rates typical of the emergency lending category; borrowers should fully understand repayment obligations and total cost before applying, as payday loans in particular carry high effective APRs due to short terms.
services: In-store loan applications with trained staff assistance
Store locator service to find nearby branches
Loan comparison and product education resources

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
